      Button

      Buttons trigger actions.

      Good Example

      export function ButtonGood() {
  return (
    <button
      className="bg-brand box-border border border-transparent hover:bg-brand-strong focus:ring-4 focus:ring-brand-medium shadow-xs font-medium leading-5 rounded-base text-sm px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none"
      onClick={() => {
        console.log("Click");
      }}
    >
      Save
    </button>
  );
}

      Bad Example

      <div onClick={() => {}}>
    Save
</div>

      Accessibility Notes

      • Use native button elements
      • Don’t use div + onClick

      Keyboard Support

      KeyAction
      TabFocus button
      EnterActivate
      SpaceActivate
